title: Incompetents
doc_html:
Art. 3474.  Incompetents

This prescription runs against absent persons and incompetents, including minors and interdicts.

Acts 1982, No. 187, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983; Acts 1991, No. 107, §1.
